title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself poses minimal risk as described, but improper implementation or reliance on it without proper validation could lead to missed vulnerabilities or false confidence in security. Additionally, if the tool is compromised or contains malicious code, it could introduce risks to users.
recommended_actions: Conduct a thorough code review of the tool before integrating it into your workflow to ensure it is free from malicious code.
Use the tool as a supplementary measure, not as a sole dependency scanner, and cross-verify results with other trusted tools.
Monitor the tool's updates and community feedback to stay informed about potential issues or vulnerabilities in the tool itself.

title: VMware Cloud Foundation Operations contains multiple stored cross-site scripting vulnerabilities...
description: VMware Cloud Foundation Operations contains multiple stored cross-site scripting vulnerabilities.A malicious actor with privileges to create policies, views or text-widgets may be able to inject scripts to perform administrative actions in VMware Cloud Foundation Operations.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-41723.

title: A vulnerability was determined in Tenda HG7HG9 and HG10 300001138_en_xpon. This affects the...
description: A vulnerability was determined in Tenda HG7HG9 and HG10 300001138_en_xpon. This affects the function formDOMAINBLK of the file /boaform/formDOMAINBLK. Executing a manipulation of the argument blkDomain can lead to stack-based buffer overflow. The attack may be performed from remote.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11499.

title: A flaw was found in Samba’s WINS server component when running as an Active Directory Domain...
description: A flaw was found in Samba’s WINS server component when running as an Active Directory Domain Controller. The WINS protocol handlers for certain request types did not properly validate incoming packets, allowing an unauthenticated remote attacker to trigger a NULL pointer dereference and crash the WINS service using specially crafted UDP packets.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The flaw in Samba's WINS server component could allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to crash the WINS service on an Active Directory Domain Controller, potentially disrupting network operations and causing denial of service. This could impact authentication, resource access, and overall system availability.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply the latest security patches or updates provided by the Samba project to address CVE-2026-3238.
Implement network-level protections by restricting access to the WINS service to trusted IP ranges using firewalls or access control lists (ACLs).
Monitor network traffic for unusual or malicious UDP packets targeting the WINS service and enable logging to detect potential exploitation attempts.

title: A vulnerability was found in Tenda HG7HG9 and HG10 300001138_en_xpon. Affected by this issue is...
description: A vulnerability was found in Tenda HG7HG9 and HG10 300001138_en_xpon. Affected by this issue is the function asp_voip_OtherSet of the file /boaform/voip_other_set of the component Web Management Interface. Performing a manipulation of the argument funckey_transfer results in stack-based buffer overflow. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the Tenda HG7HG9 and HG10 devices allows remote attackers to exploit a stack-based buffer overflow via the Web Management Interface, potentially leading to unauthorized remote code execution, system compromise, or denial of service.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply any available firmware updates or patches from Tenda to address the vulnerability.
Restrict remote access to the Web Management Interface by configuring firewalls or disabling remote management if not required.
Monitor network traffic for unusual activity and implement intrusion detection/prevention systems to detect potential exploitation attempts.

title: VMware Cloud Foundation Operations contains multiple stored cross-site scripting vulnerabilities...
description: VMware Cloud Foundation Operations contains multiple stored cross-site scripting vulnerabilities.A malicious actor with privileges to create policies, views or text-widgets may be able to inject scripts to perform administrative actions in VMware Cloud Foundation Operations.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Stored cross-site scripting vulnerabilities in VMware Cloud Foundation Operations could allow privileged malicious actors to inject scripts, potentially leading to unauthorized administrative actions, data manipulation, or system compromise.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patches provided by VMware to address CVE-2026-41722.
Restrict and monitor administrative privileges to limit exposure to malicious actors.
Conduct regular security audits and penetration testing to identify and mitigate similar vulnerabilities.

title: A security vulnerability has been detected in TOTOLINK AC1200 T8 4.1.5cu.8611. This affects an...
description: A security vulnerability has been detected in TOTOLINK AC1200 T8 4.1.5cu.8611. This affects an unknown function of the file /etc/vsftpd.conf of the component vsftpd. The manipulation leads to least privilege violation. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in TOTOLINK AC1200 T8 4.1.5cu.8611 allows for a least privilege violation via the vsftpd configuration file. This could enable unauthorized access or privilege escalation, potentially compromising the device's security. However, the severity is low, and the scope of impact is limited to devices using this specific firmware version.
recommended_actions: Update the firmware of TOTOLINK AC1200 T8 devices to the latest version if a patch is available.
Restrict remote access to the device by disabling unnecessary services and enabling a firewall.
Monitor network traffic for any suspicious activity targeting the device and isolate vulnerable devices if needed.

title: A weakness has been identified in Tenda AC15 15.03.05.19. The impacted element is an unknown...
description: A weakness has been identified in Tenda AC15 15.03.05.19. The impacted element is an unknown function of the file /etc_ro/smb.conf of the component Samba. Executing a manipulation can lead to weak password requirements. The attack is only possible within the local network. A high complexity level is associated with this attack. The exploitability is regarded as difficult. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be used for attacks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Tenda AC15 15.03.05.19 allows for weak password requirements in the Samba configuration file. While the attack requires local network access and is of high complexity, it could potentially lead to unauthorized access or data exposure if exploited.
recommended_actions: Update the firmware of the Tenda AC15 router to the latest version, if available, to address the vulnerability.
Restrict local network access to trusted devices and implement network segmentation to limit exposure.
Regularly audit and strengthen password policies to ensure they meet strong security standards.

description: A vulnerability was found in code-projects Online Music Site 1.0. This vulnerability affects unknown code of the file /Administrator/PHP/AdminDeleteAlbum.php. The manipulation of the argument ID results in sql injection. The attack may be performed from remote. The exploit has been made public and could be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute SQL injection attacks via the 'ID' parameter in the AdminDeleteAlbum.php file. This could lead to unauthorized access to sensitive data, database manipulation, or complete compromise of the application.
recommended_actions: Immediately sanitize and validate all user inputs, especially the 'ID' parameter, to prevent SQL injection.
Apply parameterized queries or prepared statements in the affected code to mitigate SQL injection risks.
If available, apply any patches or updates provided by the vendor to address CVE-2026-11489.

Monitor logs for unusual activity, particularly around the /archive1.php endpoint, and implement a web application firewall (WAF) to block malicious requests.

title: CVE-2026-10216 - A vulnerability was detected in unitedbyai droidclaw up to 0.5.3. The affected element is an unknown
description: A vulnerability was detected in unitedbyai droidclaw up to 0.5.3. The affected element is an unknown function of the file server/src/routes/pairing.ts of the component claim Endpoint. The manipulation results in improper restriction of excessive authentication attempts. The attack may be launched remotely. This attack is characterized by high complexity. The exploitability is described as difficult. The exploit is now public and may be used. The project was informed of the problem early through an issue report but has not responded yet.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows improper restriction of excessive authentication attempts on the claim endpoint, potentially enabling brute force attacks. However, the exploit is of high complexity and difficult to execute, which reduces the immediate risk. The public availability of the exploit increases the potential for misuse.
recommended_actions: Update to a patched version of unitedbyai droidclaw if available, or monitor for updates from the vendor.
Implement rate-limiting and account lockout mechanisms to mitigate brute force attempts.
Review and enhance logging and monitoring to detect unusual authentication patterns.

title: CVE-2026-10215 - A security vulnerability has been detected in Dolibarr ERP CRM up to 23.0.1. Impacted is the functio
description: A security vulnerability has been detected in Dolibarr ERP CRM up to 23.0.1. Impacted is the function checkUserAccessToObject of the file htdocs/holiday/class/api_holidays.class.php of the component Leave Request REST API. The manipulation leads to improper authorization. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used. Upgrading to version 23.0.2 is recommended to address this issue. The identifier of the patch is ee93b6f2f9dd0f6aeefe9d718ab3ab0a44326b73. Upgrading the affected component is advised.
